title: Brain Fog - Part 1 – Is Your Brain in a Fog?
summary: Dr. David Musnick (Dr. M), board-certified in Internal Medicine and Sports Medicine with 35+ years in regenerative and functional medicine, dives straight into one of the most common complaints he sees: brain fog.

title: Brain Fog Part 2 – Testing & Basic Solutions for Brain Fog
summary: Dr. David Musnick (Dr. M) picks up where Part 1 left off and gets specific about which tests make sense for brain fog and which basics help almost everyone.

title: Insomnia
summary: Dr. M breaks down insomnia and sleep: difficulty falling or staying asleep, types of insomnia, and why 7+ hours of quality sleep matters for reducing inflammation in your brain and body—plus practical tools for wind-down, caffeine timing, natural supports, and more.

title: EMF
summary: Dr. Musnick explains how RF, EMF, and electrical fields affect the brain and blood-brain barrier—and practical steps to reduce exposure from phones, WiFi, Bluetooth, vehicles, and smart meters.
